chunks.title: Amnon and Tamar
chunks.reason: Narrative of Amnon's lust, the rape of Tamar, and Absalom's initial silent hatred.

chunks.title: Absalom's Revenge
chunks.reason: The sheepshearing event where Absalom kills Amnon and the subsequent flight and report to David.

chunks.title: Absalom in Exile
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the narrative detailing Absalom's three-year exile and David's changing heart.
